---
title: "Getting Started"
---

The steps for getting started with using the UConn Health High Performance Computing Facility:

### 1) Request an account

### 2) Reset you password

### 3) Read Intro to HPC 

### 4) Connect
  - Can connect through Open OnDemand or through a terminal using SSH.
  - For terminal access, you will need to setup SSH keys and connect through the login host. See the [Terminal](terminal.qmd) page for details on how to connect through a terminal.

### 5) Understanding the file system and storage options.

### 6) Learn how to use software.

### 7) Learn how to submit jobs.

### 8) Read about best practices.
